economic_notes: Band has no land base. Member of BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership receiving 7% of net provincial gaming revenues over 25 years. Band pursuing specific claims against Government of Canada with insurance-backed loan facility; total contingent liabilities related to claims approximately $6,543,268 as at March 31, 2022.
notes: Band has only 12 members and no land base - one of the smallest First Nations in Canada. Prior period adjustment of $88,921 applied to restate 2021 figures (deferred revenue misstatement). Deferred revenue balance of $755,141 is significant relative to operations. Large contingent liability of ~$6.5M related to specific claims against Canada covered by insurance-backed loan facility not recorded on balance sheet. Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 - not 2024. isc_funding includes CIRNAC Band Support Funding $28,504 + CIRNAC COVID-19 support $126,200 less BC Gaming $18,713 = $154,704 total government transfers; osr is BC Gaming $18,713 + Interest $8 = $18,721.
